features: „ÄêUpgraded Design„ÄëThis USB hub is specially designed for Tesla Model Y Juniper 2025-2026 & Model 3 Highland 2024-2025. Embedded installation, featuring one 65W Type-C & one 30W Type-C fast charging retractable cable of approximately 3.2ft. 27W USB-C and 18W USB-C charging ports, with an integrated sliding aluminium cover. It can effectively prevent dust and water from entering the USB hub directly.„ÄêIt is Not Compatible with Tesla 2017-2023 Model 3 and 2020-2024 Model Y.„Äë

„ÄêProduct Highlights„ÄëThe dust cover is made of aluminium alloy with a great feel. Say goodbye to plastic slid cover from now on. 2 USB-C retractable cables have built-in magnets that allow you to secure the cables back into place after use using the magnet's suction. The cable placement slots are 0.59 inches wide, you can easily reach the cables whether you use your thumb, index finger or no fingernail and adsorb them back into place after use.„ÄêThe USB hub does not support data transfer functionality.„Äë

„ÄêTotal Wattage Up to 140W„ÄëProduct come with one 65W Type-C fast charging cable and one 30W Type-C fast charging cable. The 65W Type-C fast charging cable can be used to charge your laptop. And provides 27W USB-C and 18W USB-A charging ports. It helps you address the issue of having only one cigarette lighter socket in the Model 3/Y center console, lacking USB-C and USB-A ports for charging your phone, and the convenience of charging your phone. As well as the hassle of forgetting to bring a phone charging cable or having a tangled mess of cables in the car.

„ÄêKeep the Centre Console Tidy„ÄëThe charging cable is retractable. When charging is complete, Gently pull the cable outwards a little and it will automatically retract. This design ensures a tidy appearance and completely eliminates cable tangling and clutter. To use the cable for charging, simply slide the aluminum cover downward, slide it upward to conceal the charging port. The discreet design integrates seamlessly into the center console, blending in like an original factory accessory. It also does not obstruct the interior lighting of the center console.

„ÄêMulti-port and Easy to Install„ÄëOur USB Hub Docking Station's retractable cables support up to 65W of fast charging. Perfect for charging electronic devices such as your phones, gamepad USB controller, earphones, tablet computer and laptop etc. Simply tilt fit the USB hub into the centre console and slide it to the bottom of the car's centre console. Then, connect the product's cigarette lighter plug to your vehicle's cigarette lighter socket. This completes the installation.
